summary: The diff implements nearly all required Free Fire panel features comprehensively. All major pages (Dashboard, Weapons, Characters, Matches), bottom navigation, Free Fire theming, and static data are present. One notable gap is the backend REQ-8 — no backend/main.mo file change is shown in the diff. Some hacker/terminal files appear in the modified list but may not have been fully cleared from the project.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clear all backend Motoko actor logic and replace it with a minimal actor that exposes no endpoints.
missing_requirements.reason: No backend/main.mo file appears in the added, modified, or removed files in the diff. There is no evidence the backend was updated to a minimal empty actor.

hallucinated_features.description: Hacker/terminal component files (HackProgressBar.tsx, MatrixRain.tsx, ScanlineOverlay.tsx, TypewriterOutput.tsx) and hooks (useCommandProcessor.ts, useFakeScan.ts, useHackProgress.ts, useTerminalScript.ts, useTypewriter.ts) are listed as modified rather than removed, and the frontend-file-summaries.txt still describes them with their hacker/terminal functionality.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 requires replacing all hacker/terminal theme content. These files remain in the project as modified entries and the file summary still describes them as functional hacker/terminal components, which were not requested in the new build.
